name: discord-gsd
description: Discord bridge for running GSD sessions and posting final output plus discrete progress blocks.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/output-buffer.test.js dist/__tests__/routing.test.js dist/__tests__/relay-input.test.js dist/__tests__/gsd-command-catalog.test.js dist/__tests__/project-registry.test.js
